components.label: CausalSmith.Experimentation.BipartiteMinimaxDesign.VarianceNondegenerate
components.statement:
/-- Nondegenerate asymptotic design variance: `liminf_n σ²_n > 0`, encoded as an
eventual uniform positive lower bound on the variance-scale sequence. -/
def VarianceNondegenerate (σ2 : ℕ → ℝ) : Prop :=
  ∃ c : ℝ, 0 < c ∧ ∀ᶠ n in Filter.atTop, c ≤ σ2 n

components.label: CausalSmith.Experimentation.BipartiteMinimaxDesign.BipartiteExperiment.varScale
components.statement:
/-- Asymptotic variance scale `σ²_{G_n,p}(Y) = n · Var_p(n^{-1} ∑_i η_i)` under the
working design `D` (`= bernoulliDesign p` by `ass:independent-heterogeneous-bernoulli`). -/
noncomputable def varScale (D : FiniteDesign (I → Bool)) (p : I → ℝ) : ℝ :=
  -- @realizes sigma_{G_n,p}^2(Y)(defining formula n · Var_p(n^{-1} ∑_i η_i); space [0,∞) since it is the
  -- nonnegative real `card O` times the design variance `FiniteDesign.Var`, itself a mean of squares)
  (Fintype.card O : ℝ) * D.Var (fun z => (Fintype.card O : ℝ)⁻¹ * ∑ i, E.linScore p z i)

components.label: CausalSmith.Experimentation.BipartiteMinimaxDesign.VarianceNondegenerate

noncomputable def varScale (D : FiniteDesign (I → Bool)) (p : I → ℝ) : ℝ :=
  -- @realizes sigma_{G_n,p}^2(Y)(defining formula n · Var_p(n^{-1} ∑_i η_i); space [0,∞) since it is the

components.label: CausalSmith.Experimentation.BipartiteMinimaxDesign.BipartiteExperiment.hajekEstimator
components.statement:
/-- The heterogeneous Bernoulli Hájek estimator with the explicit zero-denominator
convention (each arm is `0` when its denominator vanishes). -/
noncomputable def hajekEstimator (p : I → ℝ) (z : I → Bool) : ℝ :=
  (if 0 < (E.hajekDenominators p z).1 then
      (∑ i, E.expT z i * E.Yfun i z / E.piT p i) / (E.hajekDenominators p z).1 else 0)
  - (if 0 < (E.hajekDenominators p z).2 then
      (∑ i, E.expC z i * E.Yfun i z / E.piC p i) / (E.hajekDenominators p z).2 else 0)

components.label: CausalSmith.Experimentation.BipartiteMinimaxDesign.IndepHeteroBernoulli
components.statement:
/-- The working assignment law is the independent heterogeneous Bernoulli design:
`D = bernoulliDesign p` (each `Z_k` independent `Bernoulli(p_k)`). -/
def IndepHeteroBernoulli (D : FiniteDesign (I → Bool)) (p : I → ℝ)
    (hp0 : ∀ k, 0 ≤ p k) (hp1 : ∀ k, p k ≤ 1) : Prop :=
  D = bernoulliDesign p hp0 hp1

components.label: CausalSmith.Experimentation.BipartiteMinimaxDesign.BipartiteInterference
components.statement:
/-- Neighborhood SUTVA: `Y_i` depends on the treatment vector only through its
restriction to `N_i(G_n)`. -/
def BipartiteInterference (E : BipartiteExperiment I O) : Prop :=
  ∀ (i : O) (z z' : I → Bool), (∀ k ∈ E.N i, z k = z' k) → E.Yfun i z = E.Yfun i z'

components.label: CausalSmith.Experimentation.BipartiteMinimaxDesign.BoundedOutcomes
CausalSmith.Experimentation.BipartiteMinimaxDesign.BoundedOutcomeDegree
components.statement:
/-- Bounded outcome-side degree: the constant `d̄` is a positive real and
`max_i d_i ≤ d̄`. -/
def BoundedOutcomeDegree (E : BipartiteExperiment I O) (dbar : ℝ) : Prop :=
  0 < dbar                                  -- @realizes dbar(positive regularity constant, space (0,∞))
    ∧ ∀ i, ((E.N i).card : ℝ) ≤ dbar        -- @realizes dbar(uniform outcome-degree bound max d_i ≤ d̄)

components.label: CausalSmith.Experimentation.BipartiteMinimaxDesign.BoundedOverlapDependency
components.statement:

    ∧ ∀ i, ((E.overlapNbrs i).card : ℝ) ≤ Dbar -- @realizes Dbar(uniform overlap-dependency bound Δ_n ≤ D̄)

components.statement:
/-- Envelope-optimal design selector: any feasible minimizer of `V_env`, with a
junk fallback (the homogeneous budget vector) when the argmin is empty. -/
noncomputable def optimalDesign (E : BipartiteExperiment I O) (ε B : ℝ) : I → ℝ :=
  if h : ∃ p, p ∈ feasibleSet ε B ∧ ∀ q ∈ feasibleSet ε B, E.varEnvelope p ≤ E.varEnvelope q
  then h.choose else (fun _ => B / (Fintype.card I : ℝ))

components.label: CausalSmith.Experimentation.BipartiteMinimaxDesign.approxRatio
components.statement:
/-- Observable approximation ratio `α_cert = V_env(p^{deg}) / min_p V_env` on the
positive-minimum branch, with the no-loss convention `α_cert = 1` when the
envelope minimum is zero. Total and `[1,∞)`-valued. -/
noncomputable def approxRatio (E : BipartiteExperiment I O) (ε B : ℝ) : ℝ :=
  if 0 < envMin E ε B then E.varEnvelope (surrogateDesign E ε B) / envMin E ε B else 1

components.label: CausalSmith.Experimentation.BipartiteMinimaxDesign.BipartiteExperiment.varEnvelope
components.statement:
/-- Graph-only conservative variance envelope
`V_env = 4 n^{-1} ∑_{i,j} {r_{ij}^1 + r_{ij}^0 + 2 r_{ij}^{10}}`. -/
noncomputable def varEnvelope (p : I → ℝ) : ℝ :=
  -- @realizes V_env(G_n,p)(defining formula 4 n^{-1} ∑_{i,j}{r_{ij}^1 + r_{ij}^0 + 2 r_{ij}^{10}}; space
  -- [0,∞) as a nonnegative multiple of a sum of the nonnegative overlap loads r1, r0, r10)
  4 * (Fintype.card O : ℝ)⁻¹ * ∑ i, ∑ j, (E.r1 p i j + E.r0 p i j + 2 * E.r10 i j)

/-- Graph-only conservative variance envelope
`V_env = 4 n^{-1} ∑_{i,j} {r_{ij}^1 + r_{ij}^0 + 2 r_{ij}^{10}}`. -/
noncomputable def varEnvelope (p : I → ℝ) : ℝ :=
  -- @realizes V_env(G_n,p)(defining formula 4 n^{-1} ∑_{i,j}{r_{ij}^1 + r_{ij}^0 + 2 r_{ij}^{10}}; space
  -- [0,∞) as a nonnegative multiple of a sum of the nonnegative overlap loads r1, r0, r10)
  4 * (Fintype.card O : ℝ)⁻¹ * ∑ i, ∑ j, (E.r1 p i j + E.r0 p i j + 2 * E.r10 i j)

components.label: CausalSmith.Experimentation.BipartiteMinimaxDesign.approxRatio
components.statement:
/-- Observable approximation ratio `α_cert = V_env(p^{deg}) / min_p V_env` on the
positive-minimum branch, with the no-loss convention `α_cert = 1` when the
envelope minimum is zero. Total and `[1,∞)`-valued. -/
noncomputable def approxRatio (E : BipartiteExperiment I O) (ε B : ℝ) : ℝ :=
  if 0 < envMin E ε B then E.varEnvelope (surrogateDesign E ε B) / envMin E ε B else 1
